content:
✨ MacOptimizer | Swift
🎯 Primary Use Case: To clean, optimize, and manage macOS system resources and installed applications through a user-friendly interface.
✨ Key Features: • System Monitor (CPU, Memory, Disk) • App Uninstaller with Residual File Detection • Junk Cleaner (System, App, Browser Cache, Logs) • System Optimizer (Startup Items, Memory Release) • Large File Finder
📖 Summary: MacOptimizer is a comprehensive system optimization and app management tool for macOS, built with SwiftUI. It offers a suite of eight modules to clean junk files, uninstall applications completely, manage startup items, release memory, find large files, manage the trash, and explore the file system.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
